headline: A Look At Conagra Brands (CAG) Valuation After Sector Selloff And Facility Expansion News
summary: Conagra Brands (CAG) is back on investors’ radar after its shares dropped 5.7% following a sector selloff triggered by Campbell’s weak quarterly results and reduced profit outlook. See our latest analysis for Conagra Brands. The recent drop comes on top of already weak momentum, with a 7 day share price return showing a 13.11% decline, a 30 day share price return showing a 16.35% decline and a 1 year total shareholder return showing a 32.64% loss, even as Conagra commits around $220 million...
